title: High-Speed Trains in China
text:
China has one of the fastest train systems in the world. Many people use high-speed trains to travel between cities. These trains are very popular because they are fast, clean, and comfortable.

High-speed trains in China usually travel at about 300 kilometers per hour. They connect big cities like Beijing and Shanghai. People often choose trains because they are easier than flying. At the station, passengers buy tickets, show their ID, and wait for the train. The trains arrive on time, and the journey is smooth.

Last weekend, Ming traveled from Beijing to Shanghai by high-speed train. He arrived at the station early and bought his ticket. The train left on time, and Ming found his seat easily. During the trip, he watched videos, listened to music, and looked outside the window. He saw mountains, rivers, and small towns.

Ming felt relaxed because the train was quiet and comfortable. The trip took about five hours, and he arrived safely. He enjoyed the journey and said he wants to travel by train again.

What did Ming do during the trip?
options: He watched videos and listened to music
